itinerary.mapNote: Coastal rainforest along Taiya River. Gold Rush tramway ruins. 260m.
Last trees before the pass. Historic camp used by 1898 stampeders. 330m.

itinerary.route: Sheep Camp to Bare Loon Lake
itinerary.mapNote: The infamous Chilkoot Pass — 45° scramble over boulders. Arctic tundra beyond. 660m.
Canadian side to Lake Bennett. Where stampeders built their boats. 663m.

waypoints.name: Chilkoot Pass
waypoints.note: The Golden Stairs. 45° boulder scramble to the summit. 1067m.

waypoints.name: The Scales
waypoints.note: Last stop before the summit. Gold Rush stampeders cached loads here.

waypoints.name: Lake Bennett
waypoints.note: End of the trail. Where thousands built boats to float north to Dawson.

waypoints.name: Dyea Flats
waypoints.note: Starting point. Only ghost town remains of original Dyea settlement.
